nasb.text: who goes before you on your way, to seek out a place for you to encamp, in fire by night and cloud by day, to show you the way in which you should go.

esv.text: who went before you in the way to seek you out a place to pitch your tents, in fire by night and in the cloud by day, to show you by what way you should go.

cnv.text: 他在路上走在你們前面，為你們尋找安營的地方；夜間用火柱，日間用雲彩，指示你們當走的路。
